Third Report Of Status Of Administration And Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Sep-05-2017 Continued To Sep-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Hughes for and with Brenda Lockhart (Executor).

Mr. Hughes stated that the 150 DeSoto Street property was held in joint tenancy with Mr. Gardner, that the property passed to Mr. Gardner, that there is a $265,000.00 home equity line of credit that Mr. Hummel solely took out and that it is Mr. Hummel's debt. Mr. Hughes also stated that the note was only signed by Mr. Hummel and not Mr. Gardner, that the property is not held in the Estate because it was held in joint tenancy and that the parties agree that the debt will be paid from Estate funds. The Third Report of Status of Administration and Petition for Instructions is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
